hazards.description: TTY mock required workaround — process.exit mock did not halt execution, needed throw-based mock
ESM/CJS boundary — require() call in sandbox failed, removed in favor of barrel import registration

bunker_locations: Core→CLI layer violations: core modules must never import from cli/ — caught in review
Structured error contracts: functions returning Result types must catch all throws internally
Unsafe `as` casts on user input — always use Array.isArray() guard first
yardage_book_updates: interview-steps.ts / interview-engine.ts are the canonical step + detection system — do not inline detection into CLI or MCP layers
initFromAnswers() is core-only — provider installation belongs in CLI/MCP callers, not core
@clack/prompts ESM import works fine — no special config needed
Metaphor registration via barrel import (import * as core) handles side-effect registration in sandbox
course_management_notes: Review round caught 2 HIGH findings (core→CLI violation, uncaught throw) — validates standard review tier for 4-ticket sprints
Smart defaults engine is lightweight by design — no git log analysis, just file existence checks
Metaphor previews are generated from registered definitions — no hardcoded preview text per metaphor
